Library.XMLDescription: Funkce: Vrací stav do kterého by měl požadavek přejít (pro přeskakování volitelných stavů)
Library.Command:
SET ANSI_NULLS ON GO SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON GO
-- ============================================= -- Author: Daniel Šašek -- Create date: 2023-12-01 -- Description: Vrací stav do kterého by měl požadavek přejít (pro přeskakování volitelných stavů) -- ============================================= #MODIFIER# FUNCTION #NAME# ( @State INT ,@ITSMIncidentID INT ,@UserID INT ) RETURNS INT AS BEGIN
DECLARE @FolderTreeIdent VARCHAR(900) ,@ITSMEntryMethodTypeGuid UNIQUEIDENTIFIER SELECT @FolderTreeIdent = COALESCE(itsReq.ITSMCategoryLevel5Ident, itsReq.ITSMCategoryLevel4Ident, itsReq.ITSMCategoryLevel3Ident, itsReq.ITSMCategoryLevel2Ident, itsReq.ITSMCompanyIdent) ,@ITSMEntryMethodTypeGuid = itsReq.ITSMEntryMethodTypeGuid FROM ITSMIncident AS itsReq WHERE itsReq.ID = @ITSMIncidentID
DECLARE @ITSMState_Deleted INT = 0 ,@ITSMState_New INT = 1 ,@ITSMState_Categorization INT = 10 ,@ITSMState_InputControlByOperator INT = 20 ,@ITSMState_ReturnedForMoreInfo INT = 30 ,@ITSMState_SolutionAssignedToTeam INT = 40 ,@ITSMState_SolutionAssigned INT = 50 ,@ITSMState_SolutionInternallySuspended INT = 60 ,@ITSMState_SolutionSuspendedForReview INT = 70 ,@ITSMState_SolutionSuspended INT = 80 ,@ITSMState_ResolvedForReview INT = 90 ,@ITSMState_Resolved INT = 100 ,@ITSMState_SolutionRejected INT = 110 ,@ITSMState_IncidentEvaluation INT = 120 ,@ITSMState_Closed INT = 200 ,@ITSMState_Resolved2 INT = 130
DECLARE @PermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type INSERT INTO @PermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMOperator')
/* Kontrola vstupu operátorem => Schválení nadřízeným => Přiděleno týmu schvalovatelů => Přiděleno řešitelskému týmu */ IF @State = @ITSMState_InputControlByOperator BEGIN IF ( EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM dbo.FolderTree AS fot INNER JOIN dbo.Folder AS fol ON fol.ID = fot.FolderID INNER JOIN usr.ITSMCategory AS itsCat ON itsCat.ID = fol.TableID AND itsCat.IsOperatorReviewMandatory = 1 WHERE fot.Ident = @FolderTreeIdent ) AND NOT EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermission (@UserID, 'ITSMCommonFolderGroup', @PermissionIDs) WHERE FolderTreeIdent = @FolderTreeIdent ) ) BEGIN RETURN @ITSMState_InputControlByOperator END ELSE BEGIN RETURN @ITSMState_SolutionAssignedToTeam END
END
/* Řešení pozastaveno - Ke kontrole => Řešení pozastaveno - SLA Neběží */ IF @State = @ITSMState_SolutionSuspendedForReview BEGIN
IF ( EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM dbo.FolderTree AS fot INNER JOIN dbo.Folder AS fol ON fol.ID = fot.FolderID INNER JOIN usr.ITSMCategory AS itsCat ON itsCat.ID = fol.TableID AND itsCat.IsOperatorReviewMandatory = 1 WHERE fot.Ident = @FolderTreeIdent ) AND NOT EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermission (@UserID, 'ITSMCommonFolderGroup', @PermissionIDs) WHERE FolderTreeIdent = @FolderTreeIdent ) ) BEGIN RETURN @ITSMState_SolutionSuspendedForReview END ELSE BEGIN RETURN @ITSMState_SolutionSuspended END
END
/* Vyřešeno - Ke kontrole => Vyřešeno */ IF @State = @ITSMState_ResolvedForReview BEGIN
IF EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSMEntryMethodTypeSetting WHERE [GUID] = @ITSMEntryMethodTypeGuid AND FunctionalKey = 'monitoring' ) BEGIN RETURN @ITSMState_Resolved2 END
IF ( EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM dbo.FolderTree AS fot INNER JOIN dbo.Folder AS fol ON fol.ID = fot.FolderID INNER JOIN usr.ITSMCategory AS itsCat ON itsCat.ID = fol.TableID AND itsCat.IsOperatorReviewMandatory = 1 WHERE fot.Ident = @FolderTreeIdent ) AND NOT EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermission (@UserID, 'ITSMCommonFolderGroup', @PermissionIDs) WHERE FolderTreeIdent = @FolderTreeIdent ) ) BEGIN RETURN @ITSMState_ResolvedForReview END ELSE BEGIN RETURN @ITSMState_Resolved END
END
/* Řešení zamítnuto - Přiděleno řešitelskému týmu */ IF @State = @ITSMState_SolutionRejected BEGIN
IF EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM dbo.FolderTree AS fot INNER JOIN dbo.Folder AS fol ON fol.ID = fot.FolderID INNER JOIN usr.ITSMCategory AS itsCat ON itsCat.ID = fol.TableID AND itsCat.IsOperatorReviewMandatory = 1 WHERE fot.Ident = @FolderTreeIdent ) BEGIN RETURN @ITSMState_SolutionRejected END ELSE BEGIN RETURN @ITSMState_SolutionAssignedToTeam END
END
IF @State = @ITSMState_SolutionAssignedToTeam BEGIN
IF EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSMIncident AS itsReq WHERE itsReq.ID = @ITSMIncidentID AND itsReq.AssignedAccountID IS NOT NULL ) BEGIN RETURN @ITSMState_SolutionAssigned END ELSE BEGIN RETURN @ITSMState_SolutionAssignedToTeam END
END
RETURN @State
END
